creator: josh@quick.net
text:
The Handbook states the transition from Net/2-based code took
until December of 1994 and FreeBSD 2.0 was released in Janauary
1995.

According to http://www.freebsd.org/releases/2.0/announce.html,
these dates would be incorrect;

 To: announce@freefall.cdrom.com
 Subject: 2.0 RELEASE is now available on ftp.freebsd.org!
 Date: Tue, 22 Nov 1994 06:35:37 -0800
 From: "Jordan K. Hubbard" <jkh@freefall.cdrom.com>

Fix: 

No fix provided since I am unable to locate the transition
completion date.
